title: Summarise a Massive Document
tagline: Write a prompt to distil a 50-page PDF into a 1-page executive summary.
scenario: You have a 50-page local government gazette outlining new compliance regulations. You need to feed this to an LLM, but if you just say "summarise this", it will give you a generic, useless paragraph.
brief: Write a highly structured summarisation prompt that extracts the key dates, penalties, and action items from a massive input text.
deliverables: The required output structure (e.g., "1. TL;DR, 2. Key Deadlines, 3. Penalties, 4. Required Actions")
Instructions to the AI on what to ignore (e.g., "Ignore preamble, background history, and table of contents")
submissionGuidance: The quality of a summary is defined by its structure. Tell the AI exactly what "lenses" to look through when reading the document.

rubric.label: Output Structure
rubric.description: Is the requested summary format highly structured and business-focused?

rubric.label: Extraction Directives
rubric.description: Does the prompt specifically ask for dates, numbers, and action items?

rubric.label: Noise Reduction
rubric.description: Are there clear instructions on what sections of the document to ignore?
